title: Invalid input type error with Ollama embeddings
symptom: When sending a chat message, the `tesla_q` vector store tool fails with 'invalid input type'. Ollama logs show repeated '400' responses on 'POST /api/embed'.
applies_when: Using Ollama embeddings with Qdrant vector store
root_cause: The error occurs when the input type sent to the Ollama API does not match the expected format. This can happen due to misconfiguration in the node settings or incompatible data types being sent from n8n.
fix_steps: Replace the Ollama chat model with the OpenAI chat model node.
Set the baseURL to your local Ollama instance, e.g., 'http://127.0.0.1:11434'.
agent_instruction: Change the embedding model to OpenAI and update the baseURL to your local Ollama instance.
